description_long: This object is a classic mobile phone with a compact, rectangular body and rounded edges, reminiscent of early 2000s designs. The front features a prominent keypad with raised, tactile buttons arranged in a grid below a small, slightly recessed display area. The sides are smooth and slightly curved, giving the device a comfortable grip. The back is plain and unadorned, with no visible camera or branding. The overall finish is glossy, suggesting a hard plastic exterior. The device is solid and monolithic, with no visible seams or detachable parts.
description: A compact, glossy mobile phone with a raised keypad and a small display, featuring a classic, monolithic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised keypad and display area, with clear button outlines.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, curved profile and the thickness of the device.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a smooth, featureless surface with no visible camera or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim, curved profile seen in view 1.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen appears blank with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: No visible camera modules or lenses on any side of the device.
attribute_button_layout: A grid of physical buttons is present on the front below the display, likely for dialing and navigation; no side or top buttons are visible.
